info.title: Red Light Green Light Platform API
info.description: Unified public API served through the gateway. Generated from per-service controller annotations — do not edit by hand (run `npm run generate:openapi`).

tags.name: Project Access
tags.description: Roles, role assignments, and permission lookups

tags.name: Project Config
tags.description: Per-project configuration (types, priorities, custom fields, schema)

steps.description: Ordered list of step objects (at least one required)

caseIds.description: One or more test case IDs to include in the run

version.description: Optimistic-concurrency token; update fails with 409 if stale
Optimistic-concurrency token; update fails with 409 if stale

post.summary: Log out user and clear cookies

get.summary: Get current user context
List organizations the current user belongs to

post.summary: Create a new organization (creator becomes owner)

get.summary: Get an organization (members only)
Read the append-only audit log (owner/admin only)

403.description: Insufficient role or privilege escalation attempt

post.summary: Add or update a member (owner/admin; only owners assign owner)

delete.summary: Remove a member (owner/admin; last owner protected)

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token cookie

get.summary: List all users
List project IDs for a user (IAM)
Get permissions for a user in a project (IAM)
List projects for current user
Get a single project by ID
List recent activity / audit entries for a project
List config audit entries for a project (alias of /activities)
Get the resolved config schema (types, priorities, fields) for a project
Get the calling user's effective permissions for a project
List roles defined in a project

post.summary: Create a role in a project

get.summary: List users and their assigned roles in a project

post.summary: Assign a role to a user in a project

delete.summary: Remove a role assignment from a user

get.summary: List test cases in a project (optionally filtered by suite or section)
Get a single test case by ID
List sections in a project (optionally filtered by suite)

delete.summary: Delete a section (cascades to its cases)

get.summary: List all test suites in a project

delete.summary: Delete a test suite (cascades to its sections and cases)

get.summary: List all test runs in a project

parameters.description: Optional key to make run creation idempotent on retry
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: Validation failed or invalid case IDs

put.summary: Record or update the outcome of a single test result

get.summary: Get a single test run (with its results) by ID
